case_title: ERIC D. MIRANDA VS. BUSBEE P. DEAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, ERIC D.
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-23-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, ERIC D.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S WIFE CLAUDIA BUSBEE ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-30-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT DEFENDANT IS DECEASED AS OF JUNE 27, 2009. PLAINTFF SHALL AMEND HIS CLAIM TO NAME THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF DEFENDANT'S ESTATE IN PLACE OF DEFENDANT AND SERVE THE AMNEDED COMPLAINT BY AUGUST 31, 2009, ON THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF MAY ALSO AMEND TO NAME THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE VEHICLE AS A DEFENDANT AND SERVE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT ON THIS PERSON. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MIRANDA, ERIC D. AS TO DEFENDANT DEAN, BUSBEE P. AKA PHIL BUSBEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2009 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-17-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED JUN-02-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEAN, BUSBEE P. AKA PHIL BUSBEE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFIRE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY MIRANDA, ERIC D.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, ERIC D. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, ERIC D.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
